response.justification: Bogdan brings over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, directly aligning with the required stack. His hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest equivalents), and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes) strongly matches core responsibilities. His open-source contributions and workshop leadership demonstrate exceptional communication, craftsmanship, and initiative.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent development and testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest equivalents)
Strong open-source leadership and communication skills demonstrated through workshops and public projects
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent tools are used
German language proficiency is only basic, which may impact collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Some roles involve legacy or niche languages (DLang, C++) which may raise questions about focus on modern stack
